description: Add an emoji reaction to a comment using the Bitbucket comment-likes REST API: PUT /rest/comment-likes/{version}/projects/.../reactions/{emoticon}. emoticon must be a short name (e.g. thumbsup, heart, smile, laughing), not a Unicode emoji. Pull request reactions are the primary supported case; issue comment reactions depend on server version.

resource.description: Whether the comment belongs to a pull_request or issue thread.

resource_id.description: Pull request id or issue id that owns the comment.

comment_id.description: Comment id (from the comment object returned by the read or create comment APIs).

emoticon.description: Reaction key accepted by Bitbucket (e.g. thumbsup, heart, smile, laughing).
